option.name: originalContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2) project(untitled5)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20) set(CMAKE_INCLUDE_CURRENT_DIR ON)
# ── Qt 경로 분기 ──────────────────────────────────────────────── set(QT_ROOT_OVERRIDE "" CACHE PATH "Custom Qt root path (overrides auto-detection)")
if(QT_ROOT_OVERRIDE) set(_qt_root "${QT_ROOT_OVERRIDE}") elseif(WIN32 AND MSVC) set(_qt_root "C:/Qt/6.11.0/msvc2022_64") elseif(WIN32 AND MINGW) set(_qt_root "C:/Qt/6.11.0/mingw_64") elseif(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux") set(_qt_root "/home/a1009mys/Qt/6.11.0/gcc_64") endif()
if(_qt_root) list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${_qt_root}") message(STATUS "Qt root: ${_qt_root}") else() message(STATUS "Qt root: system path") endif()
# ── CUDA 경로 설정 ──────────────────────────────────────────── # CUDA_PATH_V12_9 환경 변수에서 CUDA 경로를 읽거나 직접 설정 if(DEFINED ENV{CUDA_PATH_V12_9}) set(_cuda_path "$ENV{CUDA_PATH_V12_9}") set(CUDA_TOOLKIT_ROOT_DIR "${_cuda_path}") set(CUDA_DIR "${_cuda_path}") set(CUDAToolkit_ROOT "${_cuda_path}") # CMAKE_MODULE_PATH에도 추가하여 FindCUDA.cmake를 찾을 수 있도록 함 list(PREPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${_cuda_path}/CMake") list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${_cuda_path}") message(STATUS "CUDA path from environment: ${_cuda_path}") else() message(WARNING "CUDA_PATH_V12_9 not found, trying system path") endif()
# ── OpenCV 경로 분기 ──────────────────────────────────────────── set(OpenCV_DIR "E:/library_source/opencv/opencv-4.13.0/build/x64/vc17/lib")
list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${OpenCV_DIR}") message(STATUS "OpenCV dir: ${OpenCV_DIR}")
# ── 패키지 탐색 ───────────────────────────────────────────────── find_package(Qt6 COMPONENTS Widgets Sql REQUIRED)
# CUDA Toolkit 패키지를 먼저 찾음 (OpenCV가 CUDA를 필요로 하므로) find_package(CUDAToolkit 12.9 REQUIRED)
# OpenCV가 CUDA를 찾을 수 있도록 CUDA 변수들을 설정 if(CUDAToolkit_FOUND) # CUDA 관련 변수 설정 (OpenCV Config에서 사용함) set(CUDA_FOUND TRUE) set(CUDA_VERSION_STRING "12.9.86") set(CUDA_LIBRARIES CUDA::cudart) set(CUDA_TOOLKIT_ROOT_DIR ${CUDAToolkit_ROOT}) endif()
find_package(OpenCV REQUIRED COMPONENTS core imgproc videoio)
message(STATUS "OpenCV version : ${OpenCV_VERSION}") message(STATUS "OpenCV libs : ${OpenCV_LIBS}")
set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON) set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC ON) set(CMAKE_AUTORCC ON)
# ── 타겟 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── add_executable(untitled5 main.cpp streamworker.h streamworker.cpp videocell.h videocell.cpp mainwindow.h mainwindow.cpp )
target_link_libraries(untitled5 PRIVATE Qt6::Widgets Qt6::Sql ${OpenCV_LIBS} )
target_include_directories(untitled5 PRIVATE ${OpenCV_INCLUDE_DIRS})

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2) project(untitled5)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20) set(CMAKE_INCLUDE_CURRENT_DIR ON)
# ── Qt 경로 분기 ──────────────────────────────────────────────── set(QT_ROOT_OVERRIDE "" CACHE PATH "Custom Qt root path (overrides auto-detection)")
if(QT_ROOT_OVERRIDE) set(_qt_root "${QT_ROOT_OVERRIDE}") elseif(WIN32 AND MSVC) set(_qt_root "C:/Qt/6.11.0/msvc2022_64") elseif(WIN32 AND MINGW) set(_qt_root "C:/Qt/6.11.0/mingw_64") elseif(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux") set(_qt_root "/home/a1009mys/Qt/6.11.0/gcc_64") endif()
if(_qt_root) list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${_qt_root}") message(STATUS "Qt root: ${_qt_root}") else() message(STATUS "Qt root: system path") endif()
# ── CUDA 경로 설정 ──────────────────────────────────────────── # CUDA_PATH_V12_9 환경 변수에서 CUDA 경로를 읽거나 직접 설정 if(DEFINED ENV{CUDA_PATH_V12_9}) set(_cuda_path "$ENV{CUDA_PATH_V12_9}") set(CUDA_TOOLKIT_ROOT_DIR "${_cuda_path}") set(CUDA_DIR "${_cuda_path}") set(CUDAToolkit_ROOT "${_cuda_path}") # CMAKE_MODULE_PATH에도 추가하여 FindCUDA.cmake를 찾을 수 있도록 함 list(PREPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${_cuda_path}/CMake") list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${_cuda_path}") message(STATUS "CUDA path from environment: ${_cuda_path}") else() message(WARNING "CUDA_PATH_V12_9 not found, trying system path") endif()
# ── OpenCV 경로 분기 ──────────────────────────────────────────── set(OpenCV_DIR "E:/library_source/opencv/opencv-4.13.0/build/x64/vc17/lib")
list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${OpenCV_DIR}") message(STATUS "OpenCV dir: ${OpenCV_DIR}")
# ── 패키지 탐색 ───────────────────────────────────────────────── find_package(Qt6 COMPONENTS Widgets Sql REQUIRED)
# CUDA Toolkit 패키지를 먼저 찾음 (OpenCV가 CUDA를 필요로 하므로) find_package(CUDAToolkit 12.9 REQUIRED)
# OpenCV가 CUDA를 찾을 수 있도록 CUDA 변수들을 설정 if(CUDAToolkit_FOUND) # CUDA 관련 변수 설정 (OpenCV Config에서 사용함) set(CUDA_FOUND TRUE) set(CUDA_VERSION_STRING "12.9") set(CUDA_LIBRARIES CUDA::cudart) set(CUDA_TOOLKIT_ROOT_DIR ${CUDAToolkit_ROOT}) endif()
find_package(OpenCV REQUIRED COMPONENTS core imgproc videoio)
message(STATUS "OpenCV version : ${OpenCV_VERSION}") message(STATUS "OpenCV libs : ${OpenCV_LIBS}")
set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON) set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC ON) set(CMAKE_AUTORCC ON)
# ── 타겟 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── add_executable(untitled5 main.cpp streamworker.h streamworker.cpp videocell.h videocell.cpp mainwindow.h mainwindow.cpp )
target_link_libraries(untitled5 PRIVATE Qt6::Widgets Qt6::Sql ${OpenCV_LIBS} )
target_include_directories(untitled5 PRIVATE ${OpenCV_INCLUDE_DIRS})

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
